source_meta.source_document: PFC SIGMA TC3 Revision Knee System

systems.system_notes: Constrained modular revision knee arthroplasty platform for instability, bone loss, and complex reconstruction.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials support dedicated TC3 revision instrumentation and linked revision-knee resources.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the constrained femoral revision component family.
Official product materials describe the tibial revision tray and modular fixation construct.
Official product materials describe the constrained revision insert family.
Official product materials describe modular stem extensions used within the revision construct.
Official product materials describe modular augments for bone-loss management in revision arthroplasty.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public TC3 materials define the revision knee construct but do not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or operative-technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
